title: Delay Sidebar Reveal onRollover or Change to onClick
excerpt:

posts.author: mondaygrinder (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using the Mac app with the left sidebar hidden, the sidebar regularly reveals on rollover when I don’t want it to.

The functionality appears to be VERY sensitive. Anytime my mouses crosses the left side of the app, the sidebar reveals. Even if I am moving my mouse from the Monday app to another window on my computer.

I would like the ability to change the sidebar to only reveal on click. A second choice would be to delay the trigger the makes it reveal on rollover, so you have to sit on the left side of the screen for a second or half second to reveal it.

With the current implementation, the sidebar is constantly revealing when I am making edits to my board and it’s very frustrating.
